name: ben-test-tinker
html:
⚙
⚙
⚙
Tinkerer
ben-test-tinker
css: .tinker-wrap { width: 100%; height: 100%; background: #0d0d1a; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .gear { position: absolute; font-size: clamp(2rem, 8vw, 5rem); animation: spin 4s linear infinite; opacity: 0.18; color: #7ecfff; } .gear1 { top: 5%; left: 5%; font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 10vw, 6rem); animation-duration: 5s; } .gear2 { bottom: 5%; right: 5%; font-size: clamp(2rem, 8vw, 5rem); animation-duration: 3s; animation-direction: reverse; } .gear3 { top: 10%; right: 15%; font-size: clamp(1rem, 4vw, 2.5rem); animation-duration: 7s; } @keyframes spin { from { transform: rotate(0deg); } to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } .label { display: flex; gap: 0.05em; font-size: clamp(1.4rem, 5vw, 3rem); font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .label span { display: inline-block; animation: bounce 1.2s ease-in-out infinite; } .t  { color: #ff6b6b; animation-delay: 0s; } .i  { color: #ffa94d; animation-delay: 0.1s; } .n  { color: #ffe066; animation-delay: 0.2s; } .k  { color: #69db7c; animation-delay: 0.3s; } .e  { color: #4dabf7; animation-delay: 0.4s; } .r  { color: #9775fa; animation-delay: 0.5s; } .e2 { color: #f783ac; animation-delay: 0.6s; } .r2 { color: #7ecfff; animation-delay: 0.7s; } @keyframes bounce { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); } 50% { transform: translateY(-18%); } } .sub { margin-top: 0.5em; font-size: clamp(0.55rem, 1.8vw, 1rem); color: #5c7a99; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: lowercase; }
